text: 1g of carbs. and that is basically the whole nutrition story.

pros first: can be a clean hydration tool because especially compared with sugary sports drinks, this is a better functional option. clear real-world role because if a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot. context tells the real story because that is the whole point of misc.

the drawbacks next: most people do not need it constantly because useful tool, but not an everyday necessity. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.
B tier. Best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
